message:
Running command: 
# Set up a background monitoring script
cat > /tmp/monitor_drt.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
STEP70_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting"
MONITOR_LOG="/tmp/drt_monitor.log"

while true; do
    echo "=== $(date) ===" >> "$MONITOR_LOG"
    tail -5 "$LOG" >> "$MONITOR_LOG" 2>/dev/null
    ls -lh "$STEP70_DIR"/ >> "$MONITOR_LOG" 2>/dev/null
    ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2, "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}' >> "$MONITOR_LOG"
    echo "" >> "$MONITOR_LOG"
    sleep 900  # every 15 minutes
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/monitor_drt.sh
nohup /tmp/monitor_drt.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Monitor PID: $!"
echo "Monitor log: /tmp/drt_monitor.log"
